data.title: Northern Illinois Food Bank plans five 2026 events to aid hunger relief in 13 counties, raising funds and awareness.
data.description: The Northern Illinois Food Bank has revealed a series of five key fundraising events set to occur in 2026, with proceeds aiding hunger relief across 13 counties. These events play a crucial role in raising funds and awareness for the cause.

data.title: LightIC Technologies and indie partner to deliver cost-efficient FMCW LiDAR for automotive, robotic industries.
data.description: A strategic partnership between LightIC Technologies and indie has been announced in San Jose, California. LightIC, a top supplier of silicon photonics-based FMCW LiDAR, has integrated indie's iND83301 SoC into their architecture. This integration replaces FPGA-based processing and marks the completion of the reference design. The partnership aims to enhance automotive solutions through this collaboration. This development signifies a significant milestone, leveraging indie’s SoC technology in LightIC’s LiDAR architecture. Both companies are optimistic about the future prospects of this partnership.

data.title: Tether's XAUt tokenized gold dominates over half of the gold-backed stablecoin market, reflecting the US dollar's decline.
data.description: The XAUt tokenized gold from Tether currently constitutes over 50% of the market for gold-backed stablecoins. This increase comes as the US dollar depreciates, with growing demand for safe-haven assets.
TRADING HOUSES TO BEGIN EXPORTING VENEZUELAN LPG -SOURCES, DOCUMENT

data.title: Bitwise introduces non-custodial vault curation on Morpho offering up to 6% APY on stablecoins, aiming to expand.
data.description: Bitwise Asset Management has introduced its initial vault strategy in partnership with Morpho, targeting a potential yield of 6% APY on stablecoins. The firm, based in San Francisco, announced this move on January 26, 2026. Bitwise, a prominent player in the crypto asset management sector, oversees a client portfolio exceeding $15 billion. The strategy intends to branch out into various other investment strategies in the near future.

data.title: Hapbee appoints Bally Singh to board to drive global brand evolution amidst $6.8T wellness market surge, aiming for $9.8T by 2029.
data.description: A significant strategic decision has been made to coincide with the unprecedented growth of the global wellness market, which currently stands at $6.8 trillion and is projected to reach $9.8 trillion by 2029. This move has also sparked a comprehensive rebranding effort throughout the entire company.

data.title: SEI Network exceeds 5B transactions, sees 214% YoY surge in DAUs. Now serving 951K daily EVM users, with Chainlink integration and prediction markets.
data.description: Sei Network has achieved a significant accomplishment by surpassing 5 billion transactions and boasting 951,000 daily EVM users. The network's ecosystem is being enhanced through the addition of Chainlink equities feeds and the introduction of new prediction markets.

data.title: NEACH and Turningpoint Communications create Treasury and Payments Academy to boost expertise in financial institutions.
data.description: BURLINGTON, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--A collaboration has been established between the New England Automated Clearing House (NEACH) and Turningpoint Communications to introduce the Treasury and Payments Academy (TAPA). This innovative training initiative aims to enhance the treasury and payments knowledge within financial institutions, enabling them to enhance competitiveness, expand, and attract top professionals. With the changing landscape brought by automation and integrated payments solutions in commercial banking, financial institutions are striving to adapt.

data.title: NeuralTrust unveils Generative Application Firewall (GAF) with support from researchers and experts.
data.description: In a groundbreaking development, NeuralTrust is set to launch the Generative Application Firewall (GAF) following the release of a seminal paper on Jan. 26, 2026. This innovative technology has been created in cooperation with prominent researchers and experts from top academic establishments, as well as being backed by AI governance. The GAF promises to revolutionize cybersecurity by providing advanced protection against malicious activities. This initiative showcases the commitment of NeuralTrust to staying at the forefront of cutting-edge technologies, demonstrating its dedication to innovation in the field.

data.title: Claude AI integrates Slack, Figma, Asana & more tools within chat. Uses open MCP Apps for cross-platform compatibility.
data.description: Claude AI has integrated Slack, Figma, Asana, and various other productivity tools directly into chat. This integration is based on the open MCP Apps standard to ensure compatibility across different platforms. Users can now conveniently access these tools within the chat interface, streamlining their work processes.

data.title: KBRA assigns ratings to Jersey Mike's Funding, LLC, Series 2026-1 Senior Secured Notes; the fifth securitization for Jersey Mike’s.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has given preliminary ratings to Jersey Mike's Funding, LLC, Series 2026-1 Class A-2-I and Class A-2-II Notes, a whole business securitization (WBS). This marks Jersey Mike’s Franchise Systems, LLC’s fifth securitization since the master trust was set up in December 2019. Along with issuing the Series 2026-1 Notes, KBRA is expected to confirm the ratings on the existing Series 20.

data.title: Over 2,000 students and 600+ athletes participate in the 59th Knights of Columbus Saskatchewan Indoor Games.
data.description: The latest report indicates that the unemployment rate in the US has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest level seen in two years. This positive trend was reflected in the creation of 531,000 new jobs in the month of October alone, exceeding economists' expectations. The data also reveals a significant increase in average hourly earnings by 0.4%, signaling potential wage growth for workers. These figures illustrate a robust job market recovery and offer hope for continued economic improvement amid the ongoing challenges posed by the pandemic.

data.title: Stocks of Seagate Technology and Western Digital surged on Monday, with triple-digit gains, ahead of earnings report.
data.description: Stocks of Seagate Technology and Western Digital saw a continued increase on Monday, contributing to a significant triple-digit surge. This trend is particularly noteworthy as the companies are set to reveal their earnings soon.

data.title: Boeing poised for earnings after delays. Stock in buy zone above buy point, ahead of earnings test.
data.description: Boeing is increasing its deliveries in response to previous delays and production limitations, aiming for a significant boost by 2025. The stock of the Dow Jones aircraft manufacturer is currently trading above a key buy threshold. The surge in Boeing's stock has placed it in a favorable buying range before the upcoming earnings evaluation.

data.title: Lands' End partners with WHP Global for cash infusion and brand expansion, drives investors' wait.
data.description: A recent collaboration between Lands' End and consumer brands firm WHP Global has been revealed by the company, providing Lands' End with a significant cash injection. This partnership has the potential to fuel the brand's growth and expansion. Investors are advised to keep a close watch on this development as it could have a positive impact on Lands' End's performance.

data.title: Legence, data center heating/cooling provider, up 80% post-September IPO, enters buy zone - Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Legence, a leading supplier of heating and cooling solutions for data centers, has entered a new buying range after its initial public offering in September. The data center construction company Legence has surged by 80% since its IPO in September, indicating a strong market performance.

data.title: Janet Miller recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member in Inner Circle of Excellence for Residential Luxury Real Estate.
data.description: Janet Miller, a noteworthy figure in the field of residential luxury real estate, has been honored as a distinguished member of the Inner Circle of Excellence. Her accomplishments have earned her the prestigious title of Pinnacle Professional Member, as highlighted in The Inner Circle. This recognition showcases Miller's significant contributions to the industry.

data.title: Samuel Cape honored as Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for currency security innovations.
data.description: In Woodstock, Georgia on January 26, 2026, Samuel Cape was recognized in The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Professional Member for his achievements in advancing global currency security with Optical Design. Cape's work has been distinguished for its innovative contributions in this field.
